description: I want to view the general terrain effect of the mountainous area in central Hainan Island. Please process the DEM of that area into a continuous terrain basemap, generate a hillshade map, and display both on the map.
code:
import oge

oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service()

dem_collection = service.getCoverageCollection(
  "ASTER_GDEM_DEM30",
  ["2000-01-01 00:00:00,2000-01-01 00:00:00"],
  [108.5, 18.1, 111.0, 20.1]
)

dem = service.getProcess("CoverageCollection.mosaic").execute(
  dem_collection,
  "mean"
)

dem_base = service.getProcess("Coverage.focalMean").execute(
  dem,
  "square",
  1
)

hillshade = service.getProcess("Coverage.terrHillshade").execute(
  dem_base,
  1,
  1
)

dem_vis = {
  "palette": ["#274e13", "#5b8a3c", "#b7b26a", "#d9c59a", "#f5f5f5"]
}

shade_vis = {
  "palette": ["#1f1f1f", "#555555", "#8a8a8a", "#c0c0c0", "#f2f2f2"]
}

dem_base.styles(dem_vis).getMap("dem_base")
hillshade.styles(shade_vis).getMap("hillshade")

oge.mapclient.centerMap(109.7, 19.1, 9)
data_ref: Reference data: a raster image collection matching the task can be used(example productID=ASTER_GDEM_DEM30; example time range=2000-01-01 00:00:00,2000-01-01 00:00:00; example spatial extent=[108.5, 18.1, 111.0, 20.1]).

description: I want to compare the terrain basemap of the mountainous area in central Hainan Island before and after processing. Please mosaic the DEM into a continuous terrain surface, generate hillshade maps for the pre-processing and post-processing versions, and display them together for comparison.
code:
import oge

oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service()

dem_collection = service.getCoverageCollection(
  "ASTER_GDEM_DEM30",
  ["2000-01-01 00:00:00,2000-01-01 00:00:00"],
  [108.5, 18.1, 111.0, 20.1]
)

original_dem = service.getProcess("CoverageCollection.mosaic").execute(
  dem_collection,
  "mean"
)

crs = service.getProcess("Coverage.projection").execute(original_dem)

smooth_dem = service.getProcess("Coverage.focalMean").execute(
  original_dem,
  "square",
  1
)

original_hillshade = service.getProcess("Coverage.terrHillshade").execute(
  original_dem,
  1,
  1
)

processed_hillshade = service.getProcess("Coverage.terrHillshade").execute(
  smooth_dem,
  1,
  1
)

  "palette": ["#274e13", "#5b8a3c", "#b7b26a", "#d9c59a", "#f5f5f5"]
}

shade_vis = {
  "palette": ["#1f1f1f", "#555555", "#8a8a8a", "#c0c0c0", "#f2f2f2"]
}

original_dem.styles(dem_vis).getMap("original_dem")

processed_hillshade.styles(shade_vis).getMap("processed_hillshade")

description: Please perform simple preprocessing on this image scene in northeastern Wuhan: smooth the green band, enhance the edge structure, produce a less fragmented version, and display the major stages together on the map for comparison.
code:
import oge

oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service()

ls8 = service.getCoverage(
  coverageID="LC81220392015275LGN00",
  productID="LC08_L1T"
)

target_band = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(ls8, ["B3"])

smooth_band = service.getProcess("Coverage.focalMean").execute(
  target_band,
  "square",
  1
)

kernel = service.getProcess("Kernel.prewitt").execute(True, 1.0)
enhanced_band = service.getProcess("Coverage.convolve").execute(
  smooth_band,
  kernel
)

final_band = service.getProcess("Coverage.focalMedian").execute(
  enhanced_band,
  "circle",
  1
)

vis_params = {
  "palette": ["#1f1f1f", "#5a5a5a", "#9a9a9a", "#d9d9d9", "#ffffff"]
}

target_band.styles(vis_params).getMap("target_band")
smooth_band.styles(vis_params).getMap("smooth_band")
enhanced_band.styles(vis_params).getMap("enhanced_band")
final_band.styles(vis_params).getMap("final_band")

description: I want to compare two processing strategies for this image scene in northeastern Wuhan: one that sharpens boundaries and textures, and another that makes the image smoother. Please display the original band and both processed versions together on the map.
code:
import oge

oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service()

ls8 = service.getCoverage(
  coverageID="LC81220392015275LGN00",
  productID="LC08_L1T"
)

target_band = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(
  ls8,
  ["B3"]
)

branch_a_smooth = service.getProcess("Coverage.focalMean").execute(
  target_band,
  "square",
  1
)

kernel_a = service.getProcess("Kernel.prewitt").execute(True, 1.0)
branch_a_enhanced = service.getProcess("Coverage.convolve").execute(
  branch_a_smooth,
  kernel_a
)

branch_b_smooth = service.getProcess("Coverage.focalMean").execute(
  target_band,
  "square",
  3
)

kernel_b = service.getProcess("Kernel.laplacian4").execute()
branch_b_enhanced = service.getProcess("Coverage.convolve").execute(
  branch_b_smooth,
  kernel_b
)

branch_a_final = service.getProcess("Coverage.focalMedian").execute(
  branch_a_enhanced,
  "circle",
  1
)
branch_b_final = service.getProcess("Coverage.focalMedian").execute(
  branch_b_enhanced,
  "circle",
  1
)

original_vis = {
  "min": 0,
  "max": 30000,
  "palette": ["#1f1f1f", "#5a5a5a", "#9a9a9a", "#d9d9d9", "#ffffff"]
}

enhance_vis = {
  "min": -2000,
  "max": 2000,
  "palette": ["#1f1f1f", "#5a5a5a", "#9a9a9a", "#d9d9d9", "#ffffff"]
}

target_band.styles(original_vis).getMap("target_band")
branch_a_final.styles(enhance_vis).getMap("branch_a_final")
branch_b_final.styles(enhance_vis).getMap("branch_b_final")

description: I want to mosaic three Landsat scenes in eastern Henan into a continuous basemap for later unified display and overlay with other rasters. Please standardize the coordinate system and resolution, make the image more continuous, and display both the raw mosaic and the standardized result.
code:
import oge

oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service()

image_1 = service.getCoverage(
  coverageID="LC81230352016125LGN00",
  productID="LC08_L1T"
)
image_2 = service.getCoverage(
  coverageID="LC81230362016125LGN00",
  productID="LC08_L1T"
)
image_3 = service.getCoverage(
  coverageID="LC81230372016125LGN00",
  productID="LC08_L1T"
)

band_1 = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(image_1, ["B3"])
band_2 = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(image_2, ["B3"])
band_3 = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(image_3, ["B3"])

coverage_collection = service.getProcess("CoverageCollection.mergeCoverages").execute(
  [band_1, band_2, band_3],
  ["band_1", "band_2", "band_3"]
)
original_mosaic = service.getProcess("CoverageCollection.mosaic").execute(
  coverage_collection,
  "mean"
)

standard_mosaic = service.getProcess("Coverage.reproject").execute(
  original_mosaic,
  3857,
  60
)

final_mosaic = service.getProcess("Coverage.focalMedian").execute(
  standard_mosaic,
  "circle",
  1
)

vis_params = {
  "palette": ["#1f1f1f", "#5a5a5a", "#9a9a9a", "#d9d9d9", "#ffffff"]
}

original_mosaic.styles(vis_params).getMap("original_mosaic")
final_mosaic.styles(vis_params).getMap("standardized_mosaic")

description: I want to turn this Landsat scene in northeastern Wuhan into a natural-color layer suitable for browsing. Please smooth the green band, make object boundaries clearer, recombine it with the red and blue bands into a more visually coherent version, and display the original natural-color result and the optimized result together.
code:
import oge

oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service()

ls8 = service.getCoverage(
  coverageID="LC81220392015275LGN00",
  productID="LC08_L1T"
)

red_band = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(ls8, ["B4"])
green_band = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(ls8, ["B3"])
blue_band = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(ls8, ["B2"])
original_display = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(
  ls8,
  ["B4", "B3", "B2"]
)

smooth_green = service.getProcess("Coverage.focalMean").execute(
  green_band,
  "square",
  1
)

kernel = service.getProcess("Kernel.prewitt").execute(True, 0.5)
enhanced_green = service.getProcess("Coverage.convolve").execute(
  smooth_green,
  kernel
)

optimized_collection = service.getProcess("CoverageCollection.mergeCoverages").execute(
  [red_band, enhanced_green, blue_band],
  ["red_band", "enhanced_green", "blue_band"]
)
optimized_display = service.getProcess("CoverageCollection.cat").execute(
  optimized_collection
)

vis_params = {
  "min": 0,
  "max": 30000
}

original_display.styles(vis_params).getMap("original_display")
optimized_display.styles(vis_params).getMap("optimized_display")

oge.mapclient.centerMap(114.30, 30.61, 10)
data_ref: Reference data: raster data matching the task can be used(example productID=LC08_L1T; example coverageID=LC81220392015275LGN00).
notes: The cat operator has issues; OGE is adjusting the operator and it will be tested later.

code:
import oge

oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service()

lc09 = service.getCoverage(
  coverageID="LC09_L2SP_122039_20230306_20230308_02_T1",
  productID="LC09_C02_L2"
)

original_image = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(
  lc09,
  ["SR_B4", "SR_B3", "SR_B2"]
)

red_band = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc09, ["SR_B4"])
nir_band = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc09, ["SR_B5"])
swir1_band = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc09, ["SR_B6"])

red_band = service.getProcess("Coverage.toFloat").execute(red_band)
nir_band = service.getProcess("Coverage.toFloat").execute(nir_band)
swir1_band = service.getProcess("Coverage.toFloat").execute(swir1_band)

ndvi_num = service.getProcess("Coverage.subtract").execute(nir_band, red_band)
ndvi_den = service.getProcess("Coverage.add").execute(nir_band, red_band)
ndvi = service.getProcess("Coverage.divide").execute(ndvi_num, ndvi_den)

ndmi_num = service.getProcess("Coverage.subtract").execute(nir_band, swir1_band)
ndmi_den = service.getProcess("Coverage.add").execute(nir_band, swir1_band)
ndmi = service.getProcess("Coverage.divide").execute(ndmi_num, ndmi_den)

ndvi_scaled = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(ndvi, 100.0)
vegetation_mask = service.getProcess("Coverage.binarization").execute(ndvi_scaled, 20)

ndmi_inverse = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(ndmi, -100.0)
dry_mask = service.getProcess("Coverage.addNum").execute(ndmi_inverse, 10.0)
dry_mask = service.getProcess("Coverage.binarization").execute(dry_mask, 0)

dry_vegetation = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiply").execute(
  vegetation_mask,
  dry_mask
)

dry_vegetation = service.getProcess("Coverage.focalMedian").execute(
  dry_vegetation,
  "square",
  1
)

original_vis = {}

Please use Landsat 9 to produce vegetation and moisture intermediate results, combine them into an empirical fuel-moisture expression, and display all results together.
code:
import oge

oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service()

lc09 = service.getCoverage(
  coverageID="LC09_L2SP_122039_20230306_20230308_02_T1",

)

  lc09,
  ["SR_B4", "SR_B3", "SR_B2"]
)

red_band = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc09, ["SR_B4"])
nir_band = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc09, ["SR_B5"])
swir1_band = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc09, ["SR_B6"])

red_band = service.getProcess("Coverage.toFloat").execute(red_band)
nir_band = service.getProcess("Coverage.toFloat").execute(nir_band)
swir1_band = service.getProcess("Coverage.toFloat").execute(swir1_band)

ndvi_num = service.getProcess("Coverage.subtract").execute(nir_band, red_band)
ndvi_den = service.getProcess("Coverage.add").execute(nir_band, red_band)
ndvi = service.getProcess("Coverage.divide").execute(ndvi_num, ndvi_den)

ndmi_num = service.getProcess("Coverage.subtract").execute(nir_band, swir1_band)
ndmi_den = service.getProcess("Coverage.add").execute(nir_band, swir1_band)
ndmi = service.getProcess("Coverage.divide").execute(ndmi_num, ndmi_den)

ndvi_norm = service.getProcess("Coverage.addNum").execute(ndvi, 1.0)
ndvi_norm = service.getProcess("Coverage.divideNum").execute(ndvi_norm, 2.0)

ndmi_norm = service.getProcess("Coverage.addNum").execute(ndmi, 1.0)
ndmi_norm = service.getProcess("Coverage.divideNum").execute(ndmi_norm, 2.0)

fuel_moisture_proxy = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiply").execute(
  ndvi_norm,

)

vegetation_mask = service.getProcess("Coverage.binarization").execute(ndvi_scaled, 20)

)

Please generate two damaged-vegetation-related results, remove obvious water bodies, and combine them into a focused joint damage result.
code:
import oge

oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service()

lc09 = service.getCoverage(
  coverageID="LC09_L2SP_122039_20230306_20230308_02_T1",
  productID="LC09_C02_L2"
)

  lc09,
  ["SR_B4", "SR_B3", "SR_B2"]
)

green_band = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc09, ["SR_B3"])
red_band = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc09, ["SR_B4"])
nir_band = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc09, ["SR_B5"])
swir1_band = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc09, ["SR_B6"])
swir2_band = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc09, ["SR_B7"])

green_band = service.getProcess("Coverage.toFloat").execute(green_band)
red_band = service.getProcess("Coverage.toFloat").execute(red_band)
nir_band = service.getProcess("Coverage.toFloat").execute(nir_band)
swir1_band = service.getProcess("Coverage.toFloat").execute(swir1_band)
swir2_band = service.getProcess("Coverage.toFloat").execute(swir2_band)

ndvi_num = service.getProcess("Coverage.subtract").execute(nir_band, red_band)
ndvi_den = service.getProcess("Coverage.add").execute(nir_band, red_band)
ndvi = service.getProcess("Coverage.divide").execute(ndvi_num, ndvi_den)

nbr_num = service.getProcess("Coverage.subtract").execute(nir_band, swir2_band)
nbr_den = service.getProcess("Coverage.add").execute(nir_band, swir2_band)
nbr = service.getProcess("Coverage.divide").execute(nbr_num, nbr_den)

nbr2_num = service.getProcess("Coverage.subtract").execute(swir1_band, swir2_band)
nbr2_den = service.getProcess("Coverage.add").execute(swir1_band, swir2_band)
nbr2 = service.getProcess("Coverage.divide").execute(nbr2_num, nbr2_den)

mndwi_num = service.getProcess("Coverage.subtract").execute(green_band, swir1_band)
mndwi_den = service.getProcess("Coverage.add").execute(green_band, swir1_band)
mndwi = service.getProcess("Coverage.divide").execute(mndwi_num, mndwi_den)

ndvi_scaled = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(ndvi, 100.0)
vegetation_mask = service.getProcess("Coverage.binarization").execute(ndvi_scaled, 25)

mndwi_scaled = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(mndwi, 100.0)
water_mask = service.getProcess("Coverage.binarization").execute(mndwi_scaled, 10)

non_water_mask = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(water_mask, -1.0)
non_water_mask = service.getProcess("Coverage.addNum").execute(non_water_mask, 1.0)

nbr_score = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(nbr, -1.0)
nbr_score = service.getProcess("Coverage.addNum").execute(nbr_score, 1.0)
nbr_score = service.getProcess("Coverage.divideNum").execute(nbr_score, 2.0)

nbr2_score = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(nbr2, -1.0)
nbr2_score = service.getProcess("Coverage.addNum").execute(nbr2_score, 1.0)
nbr2_score = service.getProcess("Coverage.divideNum").execute(nbr2_score, 2.0)

joint_score = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiply").execute(nbr_score, nbr2_score)

joint_score = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiply").execute(joint_score, vegetation_mask)
joint_score = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiply").execute(joint_score, non_water_mask)

joint_score = service.getProcess("Coverage.focalMedian").execute(
  joint_score,
  "square",
  1

nir_band = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc09, ["SR_B5"])

swir2_band = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc09, ["SR_B7"])

red_band = service.getProcess("Coverage.toFloat").execute(red_band)

swir2_band = service.getProcess("Coverage.toFloat").execute(swir2_band)

ndvi_num = service.getProcess("Coverage.subtract").execute(nir_band, red_band)
ndvi_den = service.getProcess("Coverage.add").execute(nir_band, red_band)
ndvi = service.getProcess("Coverage.divide").execute(ndvi_num, ndvi_den)

nbr_num = service.getProcess("Coverage.subtract").execute(nir_band, swir2_band)
nbr_den = service.getProcess("Coverage.add").execute(nir_band, swir2_band)
nbr = service.getProcess("Coverage.divide").execute(nbr_num, nbr_den)

nbr2_den = service.getProcess("Coverage.add").execute(swir1_band, swir2_band)
nbr2 = service.getProcess("Coverage.divide").execute(nbr2_num, nbr2_den)

mndwi_den = service.getProcess("Coverage.add").execute(green_band, swir1_band)
mndwi = service.getProcess("Coverage.divide").execute(mndwi_num, mndwi_den)

lc09 = service.getCoverage(
  coverageID="LC09_L2SP_115028_20230116_20230313_02_T1",
  productID="LC09_C02_L2"
)

original_image = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(
  lc09,
  ["SR_B4", "SR_B3", "SR_B2"]
)

green_band = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc09, ["SR_B3"])
swir1_band = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc09, ["SR_B6"])

red_band = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc09, ["SR_B4"])
nir_band = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc09, ["SR_B5"])

green_band = service.getProcess("Coverage.toFloat").execute(green_band)
swir1_band = service.getProcess("Coverage.toFloat").execute(swir1_band)
red_band = service.getProcess("Coverage.toFloat").execute(red_band)
nir_band = service.getProcess("Coverage.toFloat").execute(nir_band)

ndsi_num = service.getProcess("Coverage.subtract").execute(green_band, swir1_band)
ndsi_den = service.getProcess("Coverage.add").execute(green_band, swir1_band)
ndsi = service.getProcess("Coverage.divide").execute(ndsi_num, ndsi_den)

ndvi_num = service.getProcess("Coverage.subtract").execute(nir_band, red_band)
ndvi_den = service.getProcess("Coverage.add").execute(nir_band, red_band)
ndvi = service.getProcess("Coverage.divide").execute(ndvi_num, ndvi_den)

ndsi_scaled = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(ndsi, 100.0)
snow_candidate = service.getProcess("Coverage.binarization").execute(ndsi_scaled, 40)

ndvi_inverse = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(ndvi, -100.0)
ndvi_inverse = service.getProcess("Coverage.addNum").execute(ndvi_inverse, 15.0)
low_vegetation_mask = service.getProcess("Coverage.binarization").execute(
  ndvi_inverse,
  0
)

snow_high_conf = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiply").execute(
  snow_candidate,
  low_vegetation_mask
)

snow_high_conf = service.getProcess("Coverage.focalMedian").execute(
  snow_high_conf,
  "square",
  1
)

original_vis = {}

ndsi_vis = {
  "min": -0.2,
  "max": 1.0,
  "palette": ["#8c510a", "#d8b365", "#f6e8c3", "#d9f0d3", "#c7eae5", "#2166ac", "#f7fbff"]
}

ndvi_vis = {
  "min": -0.2,
  "max": 0.4,
  "palette": ["#8c510a", "#d8b365", "#f6e8c3", "#d9f0d3", "#7fbf7b", "#1b7837"]
}

snow_vis = {
  "min": 0,
  "max": 1,
  "palette": ["#f5f5f5", "#2166ac"]
}

original_image.styles(original_vis).getMap("original_image")
ndsi.styles(ndsi_vis).getMap("ndsi")

description: For the mountainous and hilly area near Yichang, build a continuous terrain surface from adjacent DEM scenes, integrate elevation background and slope steepness, and perform basic terrain-level zoning. Distinguish low gentle areas, transition zones from lowlands to mountains, mid-high undulating areas, and high steep areas to express the regional terrain structure from flat lowlands to rugged mountains.
code:
import oge

oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service()

dem1 = service.getCoverage(
  coverageID="n030e110",
  productID="ALOS_PALSAR_DEM12.5"
)
dem2 = service.getCoverage(
  coverageID="n030e111",
  productID="ALOS_PALSAR_DEM12.5"
)

dem_collection = service.getProcess(
  "CoverageCollection.mergeCoverages"
).execute([dem1, dem2], ["dem1", "dem2"])

dem_mosaic = service.getProcess(
  "CoverageCollection.mosaic"
).execute(dem_collection)

slope = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.terrSlope"
).execute(dem_mosaic, 1, 9.5e-06)

NaN_value = 0

elev_rules = [
  (0.0, 300.0, 1.0),
  (300.0, 800.0, 2.0),
  (800.0, 5000.0, 3.0)
]

elev_class = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.reclass"
).execute(dem_mosaic, elev_rules, NaN_value)

slope_rules = [
  (0.0, 8.0, 1.0),
  (8.0, 20.0, 2.0),
  (20.0, 90.0, 3.0)
]

slope_class = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.reclass"
).execute(slope, slope_rules, NaN_value)

elev_class_x10 = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.multiplyNum"
).execute(elev_class, 10)

combined_class = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.add"
).execute(elev_class_x10, slope_class)

terrain_rules = [
  (10.5, 11.5, 1.0),

  (11.5, 13.5, 2.0),
  (20.5, 21.5, 2.0),

  (21.5, 23.5, 3.0),
  (30.5, 31.5, 3.0),

  (31.5, 33.5, 4.0)
]

terrain_band = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.reclass"
).execute(combined_class, terrain_rules, NaN_value)

terrain_band_smooth = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.focalMode"
).execute(terrain_band, "circle", 1)

dem_vis = {
  "palette": [
    "#1a1a1a", "#4d4d4d", "#808080",
    "#b3b3b3", "#d9d9d9", "#f2f2f2"
  ]
}

slope_vis = {
  "min": 1,
  "max": 3,
  "palette": [
    "#d9f0d3",
    "#fdae61",
    "#d73027"
  ]
}

terrain_vis = {
  "min": 1,
  "max": 4,
  "palette": [
    "#d9f0d3",
    "#fee08b",
    "#f46d43",
    "#a50026"
  ]
}

dem_mosaic.styles(dem_vis).getMap("DEM reference layer")
slope_class.styles(slope_vis).getMap("slopelevel result")
terrain_band_smooth.styles(terrain_vis).getMap("basicterrain")

code:
import oge

oge.initialize()

dem = service.getCoverage(

)

).execute(dem, "circle", 3)

  "Coverage.focalMean"
).execute(dem_base, "circle", 15)

relative_position = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.subtract"
).execute(dem_base, dem_local_mean)

relative_position_smooth = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.focalMean"
).execute(relative_position, "circle", 1)

slope = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.slope"
).execute(dem_base, 5, 9.5e-06)

position_rules = [
  (-5000.0, -15.0, 1.0),

).execute(tri_large, large_rules, NaN_value)

description: Using a single DEM scene, calculate terrain relief levels at small, medium, and large scales, compare class consistency and changes at the same locations across scales, and identify stable terrain-structure zones with consistently low, medium, or high relief, as well as scale-divergent zones where classification changes strongly with scale.
code:
import oge

oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service()

dem = service.getCoverage(
  coverageID="ASTGTM_N32E111",
  productID="ASTER_GDEM_DEM30"
)

NaN_value = -9999

dem_base = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.focalMean"
).execute(dem, "circle", 1)

small_max = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.focalMax"
).execute(dem_base, "circle", 2)
small_min = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.focalMin"
).execute(dem_base, "circle", 2)
small_relief = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.subtract"
).execute(small_max, small_min)

medium_max = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.focalMax"
).execute(dem_base, "circle", 5)
medium_min = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.focalMin"
).execute(dem_base, "circle", 5)
medium_relief = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.subtract"
).execute(medium_max, medium_min)

large_max = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.focalMax"
).execute(dem_base, "circle", 9)
large_min = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.focalMin"
).execute(dem_base, "circle", 9)
large_relief = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.subtract"
).execute(large_max, large_min)

small_rules = [
  (0.0, 10.0, 1.0),
  (10.0, 25.0, 2.0),
  (25.0, 5000.0, 3.0)
]

medium_rules = [
  (0.0, 30.0, 1.0),
  (30.0, 80.0, 2.0),
  (80.0, 5000.0, 3.0)
]

large_rules = [
  (0.0, 80.0, 1.0),
  (80.0, 180.0, 2.0),
  (180.0, 5000.0, 3.0)
]

small_class = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.reclass"
).execute(small_relief, small_rules, NaN_value)

medium_class = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.reclass"
).execute(medium_relief, medium_rules, NaN_value)

large_class = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.reclass"
).execute(large_relief, large_rules, NaN_value)

small_code = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.multiplyNum"
).execute(small_class, 100)

medium_code = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.multiplyNum"
).execute(medium_class, 10)

tmp_code = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.add"
).execute(small_code, medium_code)

combined_code = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.add"
).execute(tmp_code, large_class)

consistency_rules = [

  (110.5, 111.5, 1.0),
  (111.5, 112.5, 1.0),
  (120.5, 121.5, 1.0),
  (210.5, 211.5, 1.0),

  (121.5, 122.5, 2.0),
  (211.5, 212.5, 2.0),
  (220.5, 221.5, 2.0),
  (221.5, 222.5, 2.0),
  (222.5, 223.5, 2.0),
  (231.5, 232.5, 2.0),
  (321.5, 322.5, 2.0),

  (232.5, 233.5, 3.0),
  (322.5, 323.5, 3.0),
  (331.5, 332.5, 3.0),
  (332.5, 333.5, 3.0),

  (112.5, 113.5, 4.0),
  (122.5, 123.5, 4.0),
  (130.5, 131.5, 4.0),
  (131.5, 132.5, 4.0),
  (132.5, 133.5, 4.0),
  (212.5, 213.5, 4.0),
  (230.5, 231.5, 4.0),
  (310.5, 311.5, 4.0),
  (311.5, 312.5, 4.0),
  (312.5, 313.5, 4.0),
  (320.5, 321.5, 4.0),
  (330.5, 331.5, 4.0)
]

consistency = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.reclass"
).execute(combined_code, consistency_rules, NaN_value)

relief_vis = {
  "min": 1,
  "max": 3,
  "palette": [
    "#edf8fb",
    "#9ecae1",
    "#08519c"
  ]
}

consistency_vis = {
  "min": 1,
  "max": 4,
  "palette": [
    "#91bfdb",
    "#ffffbf",
    "#d73027",
    "#fdae61"
  ]
}

small_class.styles(relief_vis).getMap("small-scale relief level result")
medium_class.styles(relief_vis).getMap("medium-scale relief level result")
large_class.styles(relief_vis).getMap("large-scale relief level result")
consistency.styles(consistency_vis).getMap("terrainand")

description: Using a single DEM scene, integrate slope, local relief, and surface roughness to perform an initial screening of basic candidate areas. Exclude areas with overly steep slopes, excessive relief, or highly fragmented surfaces, and retain topographically moderate blocks as candidates for later layout or construction, producing basic candidate, general, and unfavorable terrain classes.
code:
import oge

oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service()

dem = service.getCoverage(
  coverageID="ASTGTM_N30E115",
  productID="ASTER_GDEM_DEM30"
)

NaN_value = -9999

dem_base = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.focalMean"
).execute(dem, "circle", 2)

slope = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.slope"
).execute(dem_base, 3, 9.5e-06)

slope_rules = [
  (0.0, 8.0, 1.0),
  (8.0, 18.0, 2.0),
  (18.0, 90.0, 3.0)
]

slope_class = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.reclass"
).execute(slope, slope_rules, NaN_value)

focal_max = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.focalMax"
).execute(dem_base, "circle", 9)

focal_min = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.focalMin"
).execute(dem_base, "circle", 9)

relief = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.subtract"
).execute(focal_max, focal_min)

relief_smooth = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.focalMean"
).execute(relief, "circle", 2)

relief_rules = [
  (0.0, 40.0, 1.0),
  (40.0, 100.0, 2.0),
  (100.0, 5000.0, 3.0)
]

relief_class = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.reclass"
).execute(relief_smooth, relief_rules, NaN_value)

dem_tri = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.focalMean"
).execute(dem_base, "circle", 1)

tri = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.triTerrainRuggednessIndexByGDAL"
).execute(dem_tri, 1, "False", "")

tri_rules = [
  (0.0, 5.0, 1.0),
  (5.0, 12.0, 2.0),
  (12.0, 5000.0, 3.0)
]

tri_class = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.reclass"
).execute(tri, tri_rules, NaN_value)

tmp_score = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.add"
).execute(slope_class, relief_class)

constraint_score = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.add"
).execute(tmp_score, tri_class)

candidate_rules = [
  (2.5, 4.5, 1.0),
  (4.5, 6.5, 2.0),
  (6.5, 9.5, 3.0)
]

candidate_zone = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.reclass"
).execute(constraint_score, candidate_rules, NaN_value)

candidate_zone_smooth = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.focalMode"
).execute(candidate_zone, "circle", 1)

slope_vis = {
  "min": 1,
  "max": 3,
  "palette": [
    "#d9f0d3",
    "#fdae61",
    "#d73027"
  ]
}

relief_vis = {
  "min": 1,
  "max": 3,
  "palette": [
    "#edf8fb",
    "#9ecae1",
    "#08519c"
  ]
}

candidate_vis = {
  "min": 1,
  "max": 3,
  "palette": [
    "#2ca25f",
    "#fdae61",
    "#d73027"
  ]
}

slope_class.styles(slope_vis).getMap("slopeaboutetc. level result")
relief_class.styles(relief_vis).getMap("aboutetc. level result")
candidate_zone_smooth.styles(candidate_vis).getMap("basiccandidate zoneresult")

description: Build a vegetation condition indicator from Landsat imagery and combine it with DEM-derived terrain factors such as elevation, slope, aspect, and local relief to explain spatial differentiation of vegetation. Compare the explanatory strength of different terrain factors to identify dominant and secondary terrain factors in vegetation spatial patterns.
code:
import oge

oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service()

landsat = service.getCoverage(
  coverageID="LC81270372016169LGN00",
  productID="LC08_L1T"
)

dem = service.getCoverage(
  coverageID="ASTGTM_N33E108",
  productID="ASTER_GDEM_DEM30"
)

NaN_value = 0

landsat_double = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.toDouble"
).execute(landsat)

ndvi = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.normalizedDifference"
).execute(landsat_double, ["B5", "B4"])

ndvi_scaled = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.multiplyNum"
).execute(ndvi, 100.0)

ndvi_clip = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.rasterUnion"
).execute(dem, ndvi_scaled)

dem_clip = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.rasterUnion"
).execute(ndvi_clip, dem)

slope = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.slope"
).execute(dem_clip, 1, 9.5e-06)

aspect = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.aspect"
).execute(dem_clip, 1)

focal_max = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.focalMax"
).execute(dem_clip, "circle", 5)

focal_min = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.focalMin"
).execute(dem_clip, "circle", 5)

relief = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.subtract"
).execute(focal_max, focal_min)

dem_rules = [
  (0.0, 1000.0, 1.0),
  (1000.0, 1500.0, 2.0),
  (1500.0, 2000.0, 3.0),
  (2000.0, 2500.0, 4.0),
  (2500.0, 5000.0, 5.0)
]
dem_class = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.reclass"
).execute(dem_clip, dem_rules, NaN_value)

slope_rules = [
  (0.0, 5.0, 1.0),
  (5.0, 15.0, 2.0),
  (15.0, 25.0, 3.0),
  (25.0, 35.0, 4.0),
  (35.0, 90.0, 5.0)
]
slope_class = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.reclass"
).execute(slope, slope_rules, NaN_value)

aspect_rules = [
  (0.0, 45.0, 1.0),
  (45.0, 135.0, 2.0),
  (135.0, 225.0, 3.0),
  (225.0, 315.0, 4.0),
  (315.0, 361.0, 1.0)
]
aspect_class = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.reclass"
).execute(aspect, aspect_rules, NaN_value)

relief_rules = [
  (0.0, 50.0, 1.0),
  (50.0, 100.0, 2.0),
  (100.0, 200.0, 3.0),
  (200.0, 350.0, 4.0),
  (350.0, 5000.0, 5.0)
]
relief_class = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.reclass"
).execute(relief, relief_rules, NaN_value)

ndvi_rules = [
  (-100.0, 0.0, 1.0),
  (0.0, 20.0, 2.0),
  (20.0, 40.0, 3.0),
  (40.0, 60.0, 4.0),
  (60.0, 100.0, 5.0)
]
ndvi_class = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.reclass"
).execute(ndvi_clip, ndvi_rules, NaN_value)

ndvi_min = -100.0
ndvi_max = 100.0

geo_res_dem = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.geoDetector"
).execute(
  ndvi_clip,
  "elevation",
  dem_class,
  ndvi_min,
  ndvi_max,
  NaN_value
)

geo_res_slope = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.geoDetector"
).execute(
  ndvi_clip,
  "slope",
  slope_class,
  ndvi_min,
  ndvi_max,
  NaN_value
)

geo_res_aspect = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.geoDetector"
).execute(
  ndvi_clip,
  "aspect",
  aspect_class,
  ndvi_min,
  ndvi_max,
  NaN_value
)

geo_res_relief = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.geoDetector"
).execute(
  ndvi_clip,
  "relief",
  relief_class,
  ndvi_min,
  ndvi_max,
  NaN_value
)

ndvi_vis = {
  "min": 1,
  "max": 5,
  "palette": [
    "#f7fcf5",
    "#c7e9c0",
    "#74c476",
    "#31a354",
    "#006d2c"
  ]
}

ndvi_class.styles(ndvi_vis).getMap("vegetationdistributionresult")

geo_res_dem.log("elevation factor explanation result")
geo_res_slope.log("slopefactor result")
geo_res_aspect.log("aspectfactor result")
geo_res_relief.log("local relief factor explanation result")

description: Build a snow-cover indicator from winter Landsat imagery and combine it with DEM-derived factors such as elevation, slope, aspect, and relative terrain position to explain spatial differences in snow distribution. Compare the explanatory strength of terrain factors, identify dominant factors that may affect snow patterns, and extract snow-sensitive terrain zones.
code:
import oge

oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service()

landsat = service.getCoverage(
  coverageID="LC09_L2SP_115028_20230116_20230313_02_T1",
  productID="LC09_C02_L2"
)

dem = service.getCoverage(
  coverageID="ASTGTM_N45E130",
  productID="ASTER_GDEM_DEM30"
)

NaN_value = 0

green = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.selectBands"
).execute(landsat, ["SR_B3"])

swir1 = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.selectBands"
).execute(landsat, ["SR_B6"])

green = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.toDouble"
).execute(green)

swir1 = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.toDouble"
).execute(swir1)

green = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.multiplyNum"
).execute(green, 0.0000275)

green = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.addNum"
).execute(green, -0.2)

swir1 = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.multiplyNum"
).execute(swir1, 0.0000275)

swir1 = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.addNum"
).execute(swir1, -0.2)

ndsi_num = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.subtract"
).execute(green, swir1)

ndsi_den = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.add"
).execute(green, swir1)

ndsi = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.divide"
).execute(ndsi_num, ndsi_den)

ndsi_scaled = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.multiplyNum"
).execute(ndsi, 100.0)

ndsi_clip = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.rasterUnion"
).execute(dem, ndsi_scaled)

dem_clip = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.rasterUnion"
).execute(ndsi_clip, dem)

slope = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.slope"
).execute(dem_clip, 1, 9.5e-06)

aspect = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.aspect"
).execute(dem_clip, 1)

dem_local_mean = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.focalMean"
).execute(dem_clip, "circle", 9)

  "Coverage.subtract"
).execute(dem_clip, dem_local_mean)

  "Coverage.focalMean"
).execute(relative_position, "circle", 1)

  (0.0, 300.0, 1.0),

  (15.0, 25.0, 3.0),
  (25.0, 35.0, 4.0),
  (35.0, 90.0, 5.0)
]
slope_class = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.reclass"
).execute(slope, slope_rules, NaN_value)

aspect_rules = [
  (0.0, 45.0, 1.0),
  (45.0, 135.0, 2.0),
  (135.0, 225.0, 3.0),
  (225.0, 315.0, 4.0),
  (315.0, 361.0, 1.0)
]
aspect_class = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.reclass"
).execute(aspect, aspect_rules, NaN_value)

position_rules = [
  (-5000.0, -20.0, 1.0),
  (-20.0, -5.0, 2.0),
  (-5.0, 5.0, 3.0),
  (5.0, 20.0, 4.0),
  (20.0, 5000.0, 5.0)
]
position_class = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.reclass"
).execute(relative_position_smooth, position_rules, NaN_value)

ndsi_rules = [
  (-100.0, 10.0, 1.0),
  (10.0, 40.0, 2.0),
  (40.0, 100.0, 3.0)
]

  "Coverage.reclass"
).execute(ndsi_clip, ndsi_rules, NaN_value)

snow_min = -100.0

geo_res_dem = service.getProcess(
  "Coverage.geoDetector"

  ndsi_clip,

geo_res_slope = service.getProcess(

tmp_sensitive = service.getProcess(

).execute(elev_sensitive, aspect_sensitive)

snow_sensitive_score = service.getProcess(

).execute(tmp_sensitive, slope_sensitive)

description: Using population-aging data for eastern China, first compute local Moran results for the aging rate, then add a local statistical background layer for per-capita GDP to help view the rough context of local difference areas. The task compares the two local results without making causal claims.
code:
import oge

oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service.initialize()

feature = service.getFeature(featureId="myData/EasternChina_PopulationAging_Vector.geojson")
oge.mapclient.centerMap(115, 31, 4)

vis_params = {
  "palette": [
    "#ffffcc", "#ffeda0", "#fed976", "#feb24c",
    "#fd8d3c", "#fc4e2a", "#e31a1c", "#bd0026", "#800026"
  ]
}

re_lisa = service.getProcess(
  "SpatialStats.STCorrelations.SpatialAutoCorrelation.localMoranI"
).execute(
  feature,
  "aging",
  "false"
)

re_gwss = service.getProcess(
  "SpatialStats.GWModels.GWAverage"
).execute(
  feature,
  "aging",
  "PCGDP",
  50,
  "bisquare",
  "true",
  "false"
)

rast_lisa = service.getProcess(
  "Feature_deprecated.rasterizeByGDAL"
).execute(
  re_lisa,
  "local_moranI",
  0,
  "False",
  "1",
  0.01,
  0.01,
  "",
  0
)

rast_gwss = service.getProcess(
  "Feature_deprecated.rasterizeByGDAL"
).execute(
  re_gwss,
  "PCGDP_LM",
  0,
  "False",
  "1",
  0.01,
  0.01,
  "",
  0
)

rast_lisa.styles(vis_params).getMap("LISA result")
rast_gwss.styles(vis_params).getMap("GDPlocalstatisticsscene")
data_ref: Reference data: vector data matching the task can be used(example featureId=myData/EasternChina_PopulationAging_Vector.geojson).

bus_count_2023 = service.getProcess("FeatureCollection.size").execute(bus_2023)

description: Using Wuhan 2023 transport facility data, construct a simplified corridor line crossing the main urban channel direction, create a buffer around it, and screen bus stops within the corridor. The focus is to use a clear linear spatial constraint to extract bus facilities near the main channel.
code:
import oge

oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service.initialize()

trans_2023 = service.getProcess("FeatureCollection.loadFeatureCollectionFromUpload").execute(
  "myData/wuhan_trans_2023.geojson",
  "EPSG:4326"
)

corridor_geom = service.getProcess("Geometry.LineString").execute(
  [[114.10, 30.45], [114.30, 30.58], [114.55, 30.72]],
  "EPSG:4326"
)
corridor_feature = service.getProcess("Feature.loadFromGeometry").execute(
  corridor_geom,
  "{name:'main_corridor'}"
)
corridor_buffer = service.getProcess("Feature.buffer").execute(
  corridor_feature,
  0.01,
  "EPSG:4326"
)

corridor_fc = service.getProcess("FeatureCollection.loadFromFeatureList").execute(
  [corridor_buffer]
)

bus_stop = service.getProcess("FeatureCollection.filterMetadata").execute(
  trans_2023,
  "fclass",
  "equals",
  "bus_stop"
)

bus_in_corridor = service.getProcess("FeatureCollection.intersection").execute(
  bus_stop,
  corridor_fc
)

bus_in_corridor.styles(["#FF0000"]).getMap("corridorbus stop")
oge.mapclient.centerMap(114.3, 30.6, 10)
data_ref: Reference data: uploaded vector data matching the task can be used(example file=myData/wuhan_trans_2023.geojson; example CRS=EPSG:4326); geometric constraint objects are also constructed in the code(example type=LineString; example CRS=EPSG:4326).

description: Using the riverside area near Zhonghua Road Pier in Wuhan as the background, construct two support channels in different directions: one along the river and the other connecting inland. Create an exclusion belt around the real key node Zhonghua Road Pier No. 1. The output should include support constraint zones A and B, priority candidates satisfying both supports, backup candidates satisfying one support, and blank areas satisfying neither.
code:
import oge

oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service.initialize()

study_geom = service.getProcess("Geometry.Polygon").execute(
  [[[114.24, 30.52], [114.24, 30.59], [114.35, 30.59], [114.35, 30.52], [114.24, 30.52]]],
  "EPSG:4326"
)
study_feature = service.getProcess("Feature.loadFromGeometry").execute(
  study_geom,
  "{name:'study_area'}"
)

support_a_geom = service.getProcess("Geometry.LineString").execute(
  [[114.245, 30.545], [114.29, 30.552], [114.34, 30.558]],
  "EPSG:4326"
)
support_a_feature = service.getProcess("Feature.loadFromGeometry").execute(
  support_a_geom,
  "{name:'support_a'}"
)
support_a_buffer = service.getProcess("Feature.buffer").execute(
  support_a_feature,
  0.008,
  "EPSG:4326"
)

support_b_geom = service.getProcess("Geometry.LineString").execute(
  [[114.275, 30.525], [114.29, 30.552], [114.315, 30.585]],
  "EPSG:4326"
)
support_b_feature = service.getProcess("Feature.loadFromGeometry").execute(
  support_b_geom,
  "{name:'support_b'}"
)
support_b_buffer = service.getProcess("Feature.buffer").execute(
  support_b_feature,
  0.008,
  "EPSG:4326"
)

key_node_geom = service.getProcess("Geometry.Point").execute(
  [114.2885828, 30.5512112],
  "EPSG:4326"
)
key_node_feature = service.getProcess("Feature.loadFromGeometry").execute(
  key_node_geom,
  "{name:'Zhonghua Road Pier No. 1', fclass:'ferry_terminal'}"
)
exclusion_buffer = service.getProcess("Feature.buffer").execute(
  key_node_feature,
  0.01,
  "EPSG:4326"
)

support_a_in_study = service.getProcess("Feature.intersection").execute(
  support_a_buffer,
  study_feature,
  "EPSG:4326"
)
support_b_in_study = service.getProcess("Feature.intersection").execute(
  support_b_buffer,
  study_feature,
  "EPSG:4326"
)
exclusion_in_study = service.getProcess("Feature.intersection").execute(
  exclusion_buffer,
  study_feature,
  "EPSG:4326"
)

priority_base = service.getProcess("Feature.intersection").execute(
  support_a_in_study,
  support_b_in_study,
  "EPSG:4326"
)

backup_a_base = service.getProcess("Feature.difference").execute(
  support_a_in_study,
  support_b_in_study,
  "EPSG:4326"
)
backup_b_base = service.getProcess("Feature.difference").execute(
  support_b_in_study,
  support_a_in_study,
  "EPSG:4326"
)

priority_zone = service.getProcess("Feature.difference").execute(
  priority_base,
  exclusion_in_study,
  "EPSG:4326"
)
backup_a_zone = service.getProcess("Feature.difference").execute(
  backup_a_base,
  exclusion_in_study,
  "EPSG:4326"
)
backup_b_zone = service.getProcess("Feature.difference").execute(
  backup_b_base,
  exclusion_in_study,
  "EPSG:4326"
)

blank_step = service.getProcess("Feature.difference").execute(
  study_feature,
  support_a_in_study,
  "EPSG:4326"
)
blank_zone = service.getProcess("Feature.difference").execute(
  blank_step,
  support_b_in_study,
  "EPSG:4326"
)

backup_zone_fc = service.getProcess("FeatureCollection.loadFromFeatureList").execute(
  [backup_a_zone, backup_b_zone]
)

support_a_in_study.styles(["#FFCC00"]).getMap("aboutA")
support_b_in_study.styles(["#99CCFF"]).getMap("aboutB")
priority_zone.styles(["#66CC66"]).getMap("firstcandidate zone")
backup_zone_fc.styles(["#CCCCCC"]).getMap("candidate zone")
blank_zone.styles(["#FF6666"]).getMap("")

description: Estimate fuel moisture content (FMC) distribution from a Landsat 8 scene and visualize the result.
code:
import oge

oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service()

lc08 = service.getCoverage(coverageID="LC81220392015275LGN00", productID="LC08_L1T")
lc08_float = service.getProcess("Coverage.toFloat").execute(lc08)

b6 = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc08_float, ["B6"])
b2 = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc08_float, ["B2"])

numerator_siwsi = service.getProcess("Coverage.subtract").execute(b6, b2)
denominator_siwsi = service.getProcess("Coverage.add").execute(b6, b2)
siwsi = service.getProcess("Coverage.divide").execute(numerator_siwsi, denominator_siwsi)

exp_input = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(siwsi, -3.1784)

zero_cover = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(exp_input, 0)
e_cover = service.getProcess("Coverage.addNum").execute(zero_cover, 2.718281828459045)

exp_term = service.getProcess("Coverage.pow").execute(e_cover, exp_input)

fmc = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(exp_term, 130.0)

fmc_vis_params = {'min': 0,'max': 100,'palette': ["#7d4f9c", "#c72f4e", "#6bbd45", "#b859c0", "#c4a73d", "#6b77d6", "#d15d35", "#5dbaaf", "#d0417a", "#4c342e",
 "#3e7c4f", "#d04a97", "#c28d37", "#4a7bb5", "#9e3f2d", "#4e9e85", "#a855a0", "#7e7b32", "#a15050", "#8c4f7c"]
}

fmc.styles(fmc_vis_params).getMap("Fuel Moisture Content (FMC)")

oge.mapclient.centerMap(114.28, 30.57, 9)
data_ref: Reference data: raster data matching the task can be used(example productID=LC08_L1T; example coverageID=LC81220392015275LGN00).

denominator = service.getProcess("Coverage.addNum").execute(nir_plus_red, 0.5)

base = service.getProcess("Coverage.divide").execute(numerator, denominator)

description: Retrieve fuel moisture content from a Landsat 8 optical image and display the result on the map.
code:
import oge

oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service()

cov = service.getCoverage(coverageID="LC81250382015104LGN00", productID="LC08_L1T")
cov_f = service.getProcess("Coverage.toFloat").execute(cov)

nir  = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(cov_f, ["B5"])
swir1 = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(cov_f, ["B6"])
red  = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(cov_f, ["B4"])

ndvi_num = service.getProcess("Coverage.subtract").execute(nir, red)
ndvi_den = service.getProcess("Coverage.add").execute(nir, red)

ndvi_den_eps = service.getProcess("Coverage.addNum").execute(ndvi_den, 1e-6)
ndvi = service.getProcess("Coverage.divide").execute(ndvi_num, ndvi_den_eps)

ndmi_num = service.getProcess("Coverage.subtract").execute(nir, swir1)
ndmi_den = service.getProcess("Coverage.add").execute(nir, swir1)
ndmi_den_eps = service.getProcess("Coverage.addNum").execute(ndmi_den, 1e-6)
ndmi = service.getProcess("Coverage.divide").execute(ndmi_num, ndmi_den_eps)

ndmi_x80 = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(ndmi, 80.0)
ndvi_x40 = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(ndvi, 40.0)
sum_ = service.getProcess("Coverage.add").execute(ndmi_x80, ndvi_x40)
fmc = service.getProcess("Coverage.addNum").execute(sum_, 10.0)

vis_params = {
  "min": 0, "max": 300,
  "palette": [
    "#8B0000", "#FF0000", "#FFA500", "#FFFF00",
    "#ADFF2F", "#00FF00", "#00CED1", "#0000FF"
  ]
}
fmc.styles(vis_params).getMap("FMC")
ndvi.styles({"min":-1,"max":1,"palette":["#0000FF","#FFFFFF","#00FF00"]}).getMap("NDVI_check")
ndmi.styles({"min":-1,"max":1,"palette":["#0000FF","#FFFFFF","#FF00FF"]}).getMap("NDMI_check")

swir2 = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc08_d, ["B7"])

term3 = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(term2, 1.5)
term4 = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(swir2, 0.25)

aweish = service.getProcess("Coverage.subtract").execute(aweish, term4)

description: Calculate the New Water Index (WI2015) from a Landsat 8 scene and display the result on the map.
code:
import oge

oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service()

lc08 = service.getCoverage(coverageID="LC81220392015275LGN00", productID="LC08_L1T")
lc08_float = service.getProcess("Coverage.toFloat").execute(lc08)

scale = 0.0001
green = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(
  service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc08_float, ["B3"]), scale)
red = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(
  service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc08_float, ["B4"]), scale)
nir = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(
  service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc08_float, ["B5"]), scale)
swir1 = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(
  service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc08_float, ["B6"]), scale)
swir2 = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(
  service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc08_float, ["B7"]), scale)

term_green = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(green, 171.0)
term_red  = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(red, 3.0)
term_nir  = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(nir, -70.0)
term_swir1 = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(swir1, -45.0)
term_swir2 = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(swir2, -71.0)

wi_sum = service.getProcess("Coverage.add").execute(term_green, term_red)
wi_sum = service.getProcess("Coverage.add").execute(wi_sum, term_nir)
wi_sum = service.getProcess("Coverage.add").execute(wi_sum, term_swir1)
wi_sum = service.getProcess("Coverage.add").execute(wi_sum, term_swir2)
wi2015 = service.getProcess("Coverage.addNum").execute(wi_sum, 1.7204)

vis_params = {
  "min": -100,
  "max": 200,
  "palette": [
    "#000000", "#303030", "#606060", "#909090", "#C0C0C0", "#FFFFFF"
  ]
}

wi2015.styles(vis_params).getMap("WI2015")
oge.mapclient.centerMap(114.28, 30.57, 9)
data_ref: Reference data: raster data matching the task can be used(example productID=LC08_L1T; example coverageID=LC81220392015275LGN00).

description: Estimate the Leaf Area Index (LAI) from a Landsat 8 scene and display the result on the map.
code:
import oge

oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service()

lc08 = service.getCoverage(coverageID="LC81220392015275LGN00", productID="LC08_L1T")
lc08_float = service.getProcess("Coverage.toFloat").execute(lc08)

red = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc08_float, ["B4"])

nir = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc08_float, ["B5"])

blue = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc08_float, ["B2"])

Gain2 = 2.0000E-05
Gain4 = 2.0000E-05
Gain5 = 2.0000E-05
Offset2 = -0.100000
Offset4 = -0.100000
Offset5 = -0.100000
sun_corr = 1.277985
B2 = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(blue, Gain2)
B2 = service.getProcess("Coverage.addNum").execute(B2, Offset2)
B2 = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(B2, sun_corr)
B4 = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(red, Gain4)
B4 = service.getProcess("Coverage.addNum").execute(B4, Offset4)
B4 = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(B4, sun_corr)
B5 = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(nir, Gain5)
B5 = service.getProcess("Coverage.addNum").execute(B5, Offset5)
B5 = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(B5, sun_corr)

G = 2.5

L = 1

C1 = 6
C2 = 7.5

numerator = service.getProcess("Coverage.subtract").execute(B5, B4)
red_scaled = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(B4, C1)
blue_scaled = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(B2, C2)
denominator = service.getProcess("Coverage.subtract").execute(red_scaled, blue_scaled)
denominator = service.getProcess("Coverage.add").execute(denominator, B5)
denominator = service.getProcess("Coverage.addNum").execute(denominator, L)
evi_ratio = service.getProcess("Coverage.divide").execute(numerator, denominator)
evi = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(evi_ratio, G)

LAI = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(evi, 3.618)
LAI = service.getProcess("Coverage.subtractNum").execute(LAI, 0.118)

vis_params = {
  "min": 0,
  "max": 10,
  "palette": [
    "#0000FF",
    "#00FFFF",
    "#00FF00",
    "#FFFF00",
    "#FF0000",
    "#800000"
  ]
}

LAI.styles(vis_params).getMap("LAI")

oge.mapclient.centerMap(114.28, 30.57, 7)
data_ref: Reference data: raster data matching the task can be used(example productID=LC08_L1T; example coverageID=LC81220392015275LGN00).

description: Combine a Landsat 8 scene with DEM data for the same area to analyze how terrain factors such as elevation, slope, and aspect affect the spatial distribution of vegetation growth, output statistics, and display a result layer on the map.
code:
import oge

oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service()

landsat8 = service.getCoverage(coverageID="LC08_L1TP_144030_20230831_20230906_02_T1", productID="LC08_L1TP_C02_T1")
landsat8_double = service.getProcess("Coverage.toDouble").execute(landsat8)
DEM = service.getCoverage(coverageID="ASTGTM_N43E084", productID="ASTER_GDEM_DEM30")

ndvi = service.getProcess("Coverage.normalizedDifference").execute(landsat8_double, ["B5", "B4"])
ndvi_mul = service.getProcess( "Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(ndvi, 100.0)

ndvi_mul_clip = service.getProcess( "Coverage.rasterUnion").execute(DEM,ndvi_mul)
dem_clip = service.getProcess( "Coverage.rasterUnion").execute(ndvi_mul_clip,DEM)

slope = service.getProcess( "Coverage.slope").execute(dem_clip, 0.00001171,3 )
aspect = service.getProcess( "Coverage.aspect").execute(dem_clip, 1)

NaN_value = -0

dem_reclass = service.getProcess( "Coverage.reclass").execute(dem_clip,
      [(500, 1500, 1), (1500, 2500, 2),(2500, 3000, 3), (3000, 3500, 4), (3500, 4500, 5)],NaN_value)

slope_reclass = service.getProcess( "Coverage.reclass").execute(slope,
      [(0, 5, 1), (5, 15, 2),(15, 25, 3), (25, 35, 4), (35, 45, 5), (45, 90, 6)],NaN_value)

aspect_reclass = service.getProcess( "Coverage.reclass").execute(aspect,
  [(0, 60, 1), (60, 120, 2), (120, 180, 3),(180, 240, 4), (240, 300, 5), (300, 360, 6)],NaN_value)

ndvi_reclass = service.getProcess( "Coverage.reclass").execute(ndvi_mul_clip,
        [(-50, 0, 1), (0, 10, 2),(10, 20, 3),(20, 30, 4), (30, 40, 5), (40, 50, 6)],NaN_value)

vis_params = {}
ndvi_reclass.styles(vis_params).getMap("reclassificationNDVIdata")

ndvi_norExtent = [-100,100]
geo_res_dem = service.getProcess( "Coverage.geoDetector").execute(ndvi_mul_clip,
  "dem",dem_reclass,ndvi_norExtent[0],ndvi_norExtent[1],NaN_value
)
geo_res_slope = service.getProcess( "Coverage.geoDetector").execute(ndvi_mul_clip,
  "slope",slope_reclass,ndvi_norExtent[0],ndvi_norExtent[1],NaN_value
)
geo_res_aspect = service.getProcess( "Coverage.geoDetector").execute(ndvi_mul_clip,
  "aspect",aspect_reclass,ndvi_norExtent[0],ndvi_norExtent[1],NaN_value
)
geo_res_ndvi = service.getProcess( "Coverage.geoDetector").execute(ndvi_mul_clip,
  "ndvi",ndvi_reclass,ndvi_norExtent[0],ndvi_norExtent[1],NaN_value
)

geo_res_dem.log("elevation factorcalculate result")
geo_res_slope.log("slopefactorcalculate result")
geo_res_aspect.log("aspectfactorcalculate result")
geo_res_ndvi.log("NDVIfactor（）calculate result")

oge.mapclient.centerMap(85.22, 43.16, 10)
data_ref: Reference data: raster data matching the task can be used(example productID=LC08_L1TP_C02_T1; example coverageID=LC08_L1TP_144030_20230831_20230906_02_T1); raster data matching the task can be used(example productID=ASTER_GDEM_DEM30; example coverageID=ASTGTM_N43E084).

description: Count how many features are included in a feature collection and output the result to the console.
code:
import oge

oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service()

data = [
  ([[[35, 10], [35, 15], [40, 15], [40, 10], [35, 10]]], "10"),
  ([[[38, 10], [38, 15], [43, 15], [43, 10], [38, 10]]], "20"),
  ([[[36, 11], [36, 14], [39, 14], [39, 11], [36, 11]]], "30"),
  ([[[34, 12], [34, 14], [37, 14], [37, 12], [34, 12]]], "40")
]

features = []
for coords, attr in data:
  geometry = service.getProcess("Geometry.Polygon").execute(coords, "EPSG:4326")
  feature = service.getProcess("Feature.loadFromGeometry").execute(geometry, f"{{a:{attr}}}")
  features.append(feature)

featureCollection = service.getProcess("FeatureCollection.loadFromFeatureList").execute(features)

result = service.getProcess("FeatureCollection.aggregateCount").execute(featureCollection,"a")
result.log("result")

description: Based on population-aging data for eastern Chinese cities, use spatial autocorrelation, Geodetector, and spatial regression methods to analyze the spatial pattern of aging and its influencing factors, output the main statistics, and display selected result layers.
code:
import oge

oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service()

feature=service.getProcess("Feature_deprecated.load").execute("EasternChina_PopulationAging_Vector","null","EPSG:4326")
feature.styles(["#FF7744"]).getMap("")
oge.mapclient.centerMap(115,31,4)

vis_params = {"palette": ["#ffffcc", "#ffeda0", "#fed976", "#feb24c", "#fd8d3c","#fc4e2a","#e31a1c","#bd0026","#800026"]}

morani = service.getProcess("SpatialStats.STCorrelations.SpatialAutoCorrelation.globalMoranI").execute(feature,"aging","false","true","W")

re_lisa = service.getProcess("SpatialStats.STCorrelations.SpatialAutoCorrelation.localMoranI").execute(feature,"aging","false")

re_gwss=service.getProcess("SpatialStats.GWModels.GWAverage").execute(feature,"aging", "PCGDP,GI,FD,education",50,"bisquare","true","false")

rast_lisa = service.getProcess("Feature_deprecated.rasterizeByGDAL").execute(re_lisa,"local_moranI",0,"False","1",0.01,0.01,"",0)
rast_lisa.styles(vis_params).getMap("LISA result")
rast_gwss = service.getProcess("Feature_deprecated.rasterizeByGDAL").execute(re_gwss,"PCGDP_LM",0,"False","1",0.01,0.01,"",0)
rast_gwss.styles(vis_params).getMap("GDPvariablelocal")

re_corr = service.getProcess("SpatialStats.STCorrelations.CorrelationAnalysis.corrMat").execute(feature,"aging,PCGDP,GI,FD,TS,CL,PCD,PIP,SIP,TIP,education","pearson")

re_detect = service.getProcess("SpatialStats.SpatialHeterogeneity.GeoFactorDetector").execute(feature,"aging","PCGDP,GI,FD,TS,CL,PCD,PIP,SIP,TIP,education")

re_corr.log("relationship\n")
morani.log("Global Moran's I\n")
re_detect.log("factor result\n")

re_lr = service.getProcess("SpatialStats.SpatialRegression.LinearRegression.feature").execute(feature,"aging","PCGDP,GI,FD,education","true")
re_slm = service.getProcess("SpatialStats.SpatialRegression.SpatialLagModel.fit").execute(feature,"aging","PCGDP,GI,FD,education")

description: Calculate the Perpendicular Drought Index (PDI) from a Landsat 8 scene and display the result on the map.
code:
import oge

oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service()

lc08 = service.getCoverage(coverageID="LC81220392015275LGN00", productID="LC08_L1T")
lc08_f = service.getProcess("Coverage.toFloat").execute(lc08)

nir = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc08_f, ["B5"])
red = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc08_f, ["B4"])
ndvi_num = service.getProcess("Coverage.subtract").execute(nir, red)
ndvi_den = service.getProcess("Coverage.add").execute(nir, red)
ndvi = service.getProcess("Coverage.divide").execute(ndvi_num, ndvi_den)

M = 2.0

NDVI_veg = 0.9
NDVI_soil = 0.1

f_v = service.getProcess("Coverage.subtractNum").execute(ndvi, NDVI_soil)
f_v = service.getProcess("Coverage.divideNum").execute(f_v, 0.8)

R_red_v = 0.25
R_nir_v = 0.65

red_mnir = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(red, M)
term1 = service.getProcess("Coverage.add").execute(red, red_mnir)

nir_mnir_v = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(nir, M)
term2_v = service.getProcess("Coverage.addNum").execute(nir_mnir_v, R_red_v)
term2 = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiply").execute(f_v, term2_v)

one_minus_fv_1 = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(f_v, 2)
one_minus_fv_2 = service.getProcess("Coverage.subtract").execute(f_v, one_minus_fv_1)
one_minus_fv = service.getProcess("Coverage.addNum").execute(one_minus_fv_2, 1)
term3 = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(one_minus_fv, 2.236)

mpdi = service.getProcess("Coverage.subtract").execute(term1, term2)
mpdi = service.getProcess("Coverage.divide").execute(mpdi, term3)

vis_params = {
  "min": 0,
  "max": 1,
  "palette": [
    "#0000FF", "#00FFFF", "#00FF00", "#FFFF00",
    "#FFA500", "#FF0000", "#800000"
  ]
}

mpdi.styles(vis_params).getMap(" PDI")

oge.mapclient.centerMap(114.28, 30.57, 7)
data_ref: Reference data: raster data matching the task can be used(example productID=LC08_L1T; example coverageID=LC81220392015275LGN00).

description: Calculate the Enhanced Vegetation Index (EVI) from a Landsat 8 scene and display the result on the map.
code:
import oge

oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service.initialize()

lc08 = service.getCoverage(coverageID="LC81220392015275LGN00", productID="LC08_L1T")
lc08_float = service.getProcess("Coverage.toFloat").execute(lc08)

red = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc08_float, ["B4"])

nir = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc08_float, ["B5"])

blue = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc08_float, ["B2"])

Gain2 = 2.0000E-05
Gain4 = 2.0000E-05
Gain5 = 2.0000E-05
Offset2 = -0.100000
Offset4 = -0.100000
Offset5 = -0.100000
sun_corr = 1.277985
B2 = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(blue, Gain2)
B2 = service.getProcess("Coverage.addNum").execute(B2, Offset2)
B2 = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(B2, sun_corr)
B4 = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(red, Gain4)
B4 = service.getProcess("Coverage.addNum").execute(B4, Offset4)
B4 = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(B4, sun_corr)
B5 = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(nir, Gain5)
B5 = service.getProcess("Coverage.addNum").execute(B5, Offset5)
B5 = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(B5, sun_corr)

G = 2.5

L = 1

C1 = 6
C2 = 7.5

numerator = service.getProcess("Coverage.subtract").execute(B5, B4)
red_scaled = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(B4, C1)
blue_scaled = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(B2, C2)
denominator = service.getProcess("Coverage.subtract").execute(red_scaled, blue_scaled)
denominator = service.getProcess("Coverage.add").execute(denominator, B5)
denominator = service.getProcess("Coverage.addNum").execute(denominator, L)
evi_ratio = service.getProcess("Coverage.divide").execute(numerator, denominator)

evi = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(evi_ratio, G)

vis_params = {
  "min": -1,
  "max": 1,
  "palette": [
    "#0000FF",
    "#00FFFF",
    "#00FF00",
    "#FFFF00",
    "#FF0000",
    "#800000"
  ]
}

evi.styles(vis_params).getMap("EVI")

oge.mapclient.centerMap(114.28, 30.57, 7)
data_ref: Reference data: raster data matching the task can be used(example productID=LC08_L1T; example coverageID=LC81220392015275LGN00).

description: Estimate vegetation net primary productivity (NPP) from a Landsat 8 scene and auxiliary environmental data, and display the result on the map.
code:
import oge

oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service.initialize()

lc08 = service.getCoverage(coverageID="LC81240402016340LGN00", productID="LC08_L1T")

auxiliaryData = service.getCoverage(coverageID="OGE_Case_Data/auxiliaryDataSet.tif")

imageLSWI = service.getProcess("Coverage.normalizedDifference").execute(lc08, ["B5", "B6"])

imageNDVI = service.getProcess("Coverage.normalizedDifference").execute(lc08, ["B5", "B4"])

imageNPP = service.getProcess("Coverage.calNPP").execute(imageLSWI, imageNDVI, auxiliaryData)

description: Calculate the Temperature Vegetation Dryness Index (TVDI) by combining NDVI and land-surface-temperature data, and display the result on the map.
code:
import oge

oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service()

lc08 = service.getCoverage(coverageID="LC81220392015275LGN00", productID="LC08_L1T")
lc08_f = service.getProcess("Coverage.toFloat").execute(lc08)

b10 = service.getCoverage(coverageID="myData/LC81220392015275LGN00_B10.tif")
b10_float = service.getProcess("Coverage.toFloat").execute(b10)

nir = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc08_f, ["B5"])
red = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc08_f, ["B4"])
ndvi_num = service.getProcess("Coverage.subtract").execute(nir, red)
ndvi_den = service.getProcess("Coverage.add").execute(nir, red)
ndvi = service.getProcess("Coverage.divide").execute(ndvi_num, ndvi_den)

bt = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(b10_float, 0.00341802)
bt_k = service.getProcess("Coverage.addNum").execute(bt, 149.0)
lst_c = service.getProcess("Coverage.subtractNum").execute(bt_k, 273.15)

a_wet = 25.0
b_wet = -10.0
a_dry = 45.0
b_dry = -5.0

ndvi_bwet = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(ndvi, b_wet)
lst_min = service.getProcess("Coverage.addNum").execute(ndvi_bwet, a_wet)

ndvi_bdry = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(ndvi, b_dry)
lst_max = service.getProcess("Coverage.addNum").execute(ndvi_bdry, a_dry)

num = service.getProcess("Coverage.subtract").execute(lst_c, lst_min)
den = service.getProcess("Coverage.subtract").execute(lst_max, lst_min)
tvdi = service.getProcess("Coverage.divide").execute(num, den)

vis_params = {
  "min": 0,
  "max": 1,
  "palette": [
    "#0000FF", "#00FFFF", "#00FF00", "#FFFF00",
    "#FFA500", "#FF0000", "#800000"
  ]
}

tvdi.styles(vis_params).getMap("vegetation TVDI")
oge.mapclient.centerMap(114.28, 30.57, 7)
data_ref: Reference data: raster data matching the task can be used(example productID=LC08_L1T; example coverageID=LC81220392015275LGN00).

description: Calculate the Burn Severity Index (CSI) using pre-fire and post-fire Landsat scenes and display the result on the map.
code:
import oge
oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service()

lc08_post = service.getCoverage(coverageID="LC08_L1TP_127037_20190101_20200829_02_T1", productID="LC08_L1TP_C02_T1")
lc08_post_d = service.getProcess("Coverage.toFloat").execute(lc08_post)

nir1 = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc08_pre_d, ["B5"])
swir1 = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc08_pre_d, ["B6"])

nir = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc08_post_d, ["B5"])
swir = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc08_post_d, ["B6"])

nbr_pre = service.getProcess("Coverage.normalizedDifference").execute(lc08_pre_d, ["B5", "B6"])
nbr_post = service.getProcess("Coverage.normalizedDifference").execute(lc08_post_d, ["B5", "B6"])

csi = service.getProcess("Coverage.subtract").execute(nbr_pre, nbr_post)
vis_params = {"min": -0.45, "max": 0.45, "palette": ["#808080", "#949494", "#a9a9a9", "#bdbebd", "#d3d3d3","#e9e9e9"]}
